metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace — .NET/Vue developer toolkit, kit builder, git workflows, GitHub and Bitbucket platform kits, Jira sprint work, Confluence documentation, Obsidian personal notes, intelligent memory management, and token cost optimization.

plugins.name: dotnet-kit
plugins.description: Production-ready .NET Clean Architecture developer toolkit. CQRS, EF Core, Minimal APIs, Serilog+Seq, CI/CD pipeline generation, and full tech lead workflow (SDLC compliance, PR prep, code review). Powered by devkit-mcp Roslyn analysis server.
features: 44 skills covering full .NET development lifecycle
15 specialist agents (architect, EF Core, security, performance, devops)
CQRS/MediatR scaffolding with Clean Architecture layers
EF Core migrations, query optimization, and schema tooling
Minimal API endpoint scaffolding with versioning and OpenAPI
Serilog structured logging with Seq sink configuration
TeamCity / Octopus Deploy / GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline generation
Tech lead workflow: SDLC compliance, PR prep, code review, wrap-up ritual
Split-memory CLAUDE.md strategy for large .NET projects
devkit-mcp Roslyn analysis MCP server for deep code inspection

plugins.name: vue-kit
plugins.description: Vue 3 + TypeScript developer toolkit. Component scaffolding, Pinia stores, typed API clients, Vitest testing, Vue Router patterns, SignalR integration, error handling, performance optimization, and TailwindCSS. Powered by vue-mcp SFC analysis server.
features: Vue 3 Composition API component scaffolding with TypeScript
Pinia store scaffolding with actions, getters, and persistence
Typed API client generation with error handling and interceptors
Vitest testing patterns for components, composables, and stores
Vue Router patterns: dynamic routes, navigation guards, lazy loading
SignalR hub integration for real-time Vue components
TailwindCSS component patterns and responsive design utilities
Performance optimization: virtual scrolling, lazy loading, bundle analysis
Tech lead and security auditor agents for Vue codebases
vue-mcp SFC analysis MCP server for component inspection

plugins.name: kit-maker
plugins.description: Meta-kit for creating, auditing, and publishing marketplace-ready Claude Code plugins. Includes skill scaffolding wizards, kit health checks, self-evolution, and quality standards enforcement.
features: Interactive scaffold wizards for skills, rules, knowledge docs, agents, hooks
/scaffold-kit: create a complete kit from scratch in one command
kit-health-check: full audit with structure, coverage, and quality scores
skill-auditor: validate trigger keywords, examples, and anti-patterns
kit-packager: version-bump, validate, and sync marketplace.json
9 specialist agents covering every component of kit creation
kit-anatomy.md: deep reference for kit structure and conventions
Quality gates enforced on every scaffold output

plugins.name: git-kit
plugins.description: Git CLI toolkit — smarter commits, branching, rebase, conflict resolution, stash, undo, repo health, and hooks. Two specialist agents (git-historian, git-surgeon) and installable commit-msg validator and pre-push guard hooks.
features: Smart commit skill with conventional commit format enforcement
Branch management: create, switch, rename, delete with safety checks
Interactive rebase guidance with conflict resolution assistance
Conflict resolution: file-by-file merge with context explanation
Stash workflow: save, list, apply, drop with description tracking
Undo operations: revert, reset, restore with safety guardrails
Repo health check: dangling refs, large files, hook status
git-historian agent: log analysis, blame, bisect, pickaxe search
git-surgeon agent: complex history rewriting, cherry-pick, subtree
Installable commit-msg and pre-push hooks via /git-setup

plugins.name: github-kit
plugins.description: GitHub platform toolkit — PR creation and management via gh CLI, semantic release tagging, and GitHub-specific workflows. Pairs with git-kit for local operations.
features: PR creation with structured body: why/what/test-plan template
PR review with mentoring (coaching) or gatekeeper (strict) modes
GitHub releases: semantic versioning, auto-generated release notes
gh CLI integration for all GitHub operations
Two-level config: user/device level + project level overrides
pr-reviewer agent: automated review with severity grading
release-engineer agent: manages release process and changelogs

plugins.name: bitbucket-kit
plugins.description: Bitbucket platform toolkit — PR creation and management via Bitbucket REST API v2. Pairs with git-kit for local operations. Does not require Bitbucket Pipelines.
features: PR creation via Bitbucket REST API v2 (no Pipelines required)
PR review with mentoring and gatekeeper modes
Bitbucket releases and tag management
BITBUCKET_API_TOKEN env-var auth with no credentials in source
Two-level config: user/device level + project level overrides
bb-historian and bb-reviewer specialist agents
Python-based API calls (no jq dependency)

plugins.name: jira-kit
plugins.description: Jira sprint toolkit — epics, single story writing (business and technical), tech refinement, and daily standup prep via the Atlassian MCP OAuth.
features: Epic creation with structured hierarchy and acceptance criteria
Story writing: business description + technical breakdown in one command
Tech refinement: story decomposition with sizing and dependencies
Daily standup prep: pull yesterday/today/blockers from Jira
sprint-planner agent: sprint planning, velocity tracking, board management
Atlassian MCP OAuth: single auth session covers Jira and Confluence

plugins.name: confluence-kit
plugins.description: Confluence documentation toolkit — Architecture Decision Records (ADRs), Software Decision Records (SDRs), and SDLC page management via Atlassian MCP OAuth. Shares auth session with jira-kit.
features: ADR (Architecture Decision Record) creation with full context and status
SDR (Software Decision Record) for technical implementation decisions
SDLC page management: sprint pages, release notes, post-mortems
Structured templates with status tracking (proposed/accepted/deprecated)
doc-writer agent: documentation specialist for complex page authoring
Atlassian MCP OAuth: single auth session covers Jira and Confluence
Cross-links between ADRs and related Jira epics/stories

plugins.name: obsidian-kit
plugins.description: Obsidian personal knowledge base toolkit — create, search, and manage notes in your local vault. Daily dev journal and project note integration with dotnet-kit or vue-kit session management.
features: Note creation with templates: dev journal, project, reference, meeting
Vault search and navigation across all notes and tags
JSON Canvas creation for visual knowledge mapping
Obsidian Bases integration for structured data in notes
Obsidian Flavored Markdown: callouts, embeds, wikilinks
Defuddle web extraction: clean article text into vault notes
CLI vault interaction via obsidian-cli
vault-curator agent: vault organization, orphan cleanup, tag maintenance

plugins.name: memory-kit
plugins.description: Intelligent memory management meta-kit for Claude Code. Auto-captures corrections and discoveries via hooks, injects relevant memories at session start, provides semantic retrieval, deduplication, and lifecycle management via the memory-mcp server.
features: Auto-capture hook: detects corrections and discoveries after each response
Session inject hook: loads MEMORY.md into context at session start
Semantic memory search via memory-mcp TF-IDF engine
memory-health: audit for stale entries, duplicates, index drift
memory-consolidate: deduplicate and merge similar memories
memory-capture: manually store a memory with auto-classification
memory-recall: surface top relevant memories for current work
memory-forget: deprecate or permanently delete memories
memory-curator agent: deep curation sessions with conflict resolution

plugins.name: cost-optimizer-kit
plugins.description: Token cost optimization toolkit. Model selection matrix, context audit with letter grades, Ruflo-inspired 30-50% token reduction patterns (ReasoningBank, smart routing, caching, batching), and CLAUDE.md generation.
features: Context audit with letter grades (A-F) across 5 efficiency dimensions
Model selection matrix: Haiku/Sonnet/Opus routing by task complexity
ReasoningBank: store and retrieve reasoning patterns (~32% token saving)
Cache efficiency analysis: stable prefix detection, dynamic content warnings
Kit selection guide: prune irrelevant kits for up to 8,000 tokens/turn saved
CLAUDE.md generation: produce an optimized config from scratch
Budget alert hook: warns at 80%/100% of monthly spend threshold
model-router agent: classify any task and recommend cheapest viable model
token-analyzer agent: comprehensive token footprint audit with savings estimates
Overall GPA scoring with prioritized savings recommendations
